name: space-ska
documentation: ## ska - Spectral-Kit for Asteroids Suites of tools to compute colors from spectra or reflectance spectra using the [SVO Filter Service](http://svo2.cab.inta-csic.es/theory/fps/index.php?mode=voservice) in different photometric system: Vega, AB, ST. ## Installation Install from PyPi using `pip`: $ pip install space-ska The minimum required `python` version is 3.8. ## Documentation Check out the documentation at [https://space-ska.readthedocs.io](https://space-ska.readthedocs.io/en/latest/) or run $ ska docs

functions.name: ska.svo.download_filter_list
documentation:
Retrieve the list of filter IDs from SVO Filter Service
http://svo2.cab.inta-csic.es/theory/fps/

Returns
=======
list
    The list of filter IDS

functions.name: ska.svo.load_filter_list
documentation:
Read all filter IDs from a cache list

Returns
=======
list
    The list of filter IDS

functions.name: ska.svo.download_filter
documentation:
Download a filter VOTable from SVO Filter Service
http://svo2.cab.inta-csic.es/theory/fps/index.php?mode=voservice

Parameters
==========
id : str
    The unique SVO filter identifier to be downloaded

force : bool
    If True, the filter VOTable will be downloaded even if it is already cached

Returns
=======
str
    The path to the filter VOTable file

modules.name: ska
documentation: Spectral-Kit for Asteroids.

methods.name: ska.filter.Filter.__init__
documentation:
Load a filter.

Parameters
----------
id : str
    The filter unique ID (see SVO filter service)

methods.name: ska.filter.Filter.compute_flux
documentation:
Computes the flux of a spectrum in a given band.

Parameters
----------
spectrum : pd.DataFrame
    Wavelength: in Angstrom
    Flux: Flux density (erg/cm2/s/ang)

Returns
-------
float
    The computed mean flux density

methods.name: ska.filter.Filter.solar_color
documentation:
Compute the color of the Sun between current and provided filter

Parameters
==========
filter: str
    The filter unique ID (see SVO filter service)

phot_sys : str
    Photometric system in which to report the color (default=AB)

vega : ska.Spectrum

Returns
=======
float
    The solar color

methods.name: ska.filter.Filter.plot_transmission
documentation:
Create a plot of the transmission.

Parameters
----------
figure : str
    Path to save a figure

Returns
-------
figure, axe
    Matplotlib figure and axe

documentation: Spectrum from Input

methods.name: ska.spectrum.Spectrum.compute_color
documentation:
Computes filter_1-filter_2 color of spectrum in the requested system.

Parameters
==========
filter_1: ska.Filter

filter_2: ska.Filter

phot_sys : str
    Photometric system in which to report the color (default=Vega)

vega : ska.Spectrum
    The spectrum of Vega

Returns
=======
float
    The requested color
Color computation

methods.name: ska.spectrum.Spectrum.reflectance_to_flux
documentation:
Convert reflectance to flux by multiply by Solar spectrum.

==========
sun : ska.Spectrum
    Spectrum of the Sun

Returns
=======
ska.Spectrum
    A copy of the input Spectrum, in flux units

methods.name: ska.spectrum.Spectrum.reflectance_to_color
documentation:
Computes filter_1-filter_2 color for a reflectance spectrum.

filter_2: ska.Filter

phot_sys : str
    Photometric system in which to report the color (default=Vega)

vega : ska.Spectrum
    Spectrum of Vega

    Spectrum of the Sun

Returns
=======
float
    The requested color
